confirmation.title: Thank You for Contacting Us
confirmation.preview: We received your enquiry — quote within 12 hours for standard items.
confirmation.receivedMessage: Thank you for reaching out. We have received your enquiry and will reply with a quote within 12 hours for standard items (within 48 hours for custom work).

confirmation.urgentHelp: If you have any urgent questions, please do not hesitate to contact us directly.
